name: GitHub Dev Assistant
description: Complete GitHub development workflow automation — repos, files, branches, PRs, issues, commits, Actions workflows, labels, repo info, user profile, gists, notifications, starring, security alerts, and discussions via Personal Access Token

github_token.description: GitHub Personal Access Token (create at https://github.com/settings/tokens)

tools.name: github_check_auth
tools.description: Check if GitHub is connected and verify the authenticated account

tools.name: github_list_repos
tools.description: List GitHub repositories for a user or organization

tools.name: github_create_repo
tools.description: Create a new GitHub repository

tools.name: github_get_file
tools.description: Read a file or list a directory from a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_update_file
tools.description: Create or update a file in a GitHub repository with a commit

tools.name: github_create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch in a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file from a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_list_directory
tools.description: List contents of a directory in a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_list_files
tools.description: List files in a GitHub repository or directory

tools.name: github_search_code
tools.description: Search for code patterns within a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_download_file
tools.description: Download a file from GitHub and return its content

tools.name: github_create_pr
tools.description: Create a new pull request

tools.name: github_list_prs
tools.description: List pull requests in a repository

tools.name: github_get_pull_request
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific pull request

tools.name: github_merge_pr
tools.description: Merge a pull request

tools.name: github_list_pull_request_reviews
tools.description: List reviews on a pull request

tools.name: github_create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a repository

tools.name: github_list_issues
tools.description: List issues in a repository

tools.name: github_comment_issue
tools.description: Add a comment to an issue or pull request

tools.name: github_close_issue
tools.description: Close an issue or pull request

tools.name: github_list_comments
tools.description: List comments on an issue or pull request

tools.name: github_update_issue
tools.description: Update the title, body, labels, or state of an existing issue

tools.name: github_reopen_issue
tools.description: Reopen a closed issue

tools.name: github_assign_issue
tools.description: Assign an issue to one or more users

tools.name: github_list_commits
tools.description: List commits in a repository

tools.name: github_get_commit
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific commit including changed files

tools.name: github_trigger_workflow
tools.description: Manually trigger a GitHub Actions workflow

tools.name: github_list_workflows
tools.description: List GitHub Actions workflows in a repository

tools.name: github_list_workflow_runs
tools.description: List runs of GitHub Actions workflows

tools.name: github_cancel_workflow_run
tools.description: Cancel a running GitHub Actions workflow run

tools.name: github_list_labels
tools.description: List labels in a repository

tools.name: github_create_label
tools.description: Create a new label in a repository

tools.name: github_delete_label
tools.description: Delete a label from a repository

tools.name: github_list_languages
tools.description: List programming languages used in a repository

tools.name: github_list_collaborators
tools.description: List collaborators on a repository

tools.name: github_list_teams
tools.description: List teams in a GitHub organization

tools.name: github_fork_repo
tools.description: Fork a GitHub repository into the authenticated user's account or an organization

tools.name: github_search_repos
tools.description: Search GitHub repositories using search qualifiers

tools.name: github_list_branches
tools.description: List branches in a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_push_files
tools.description: Commit multiple files to a GitHub repository in a single operation

tools.name: github_get_repo_tree
tools.description: Get the full file tree of a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_list_tags
tools.description: List tags in a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_list_releases
tools.description: List releases for a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_get_latest_release
tools.description: Get the latest stable release of a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_search_issues
tools.description: Search for issues and pull requests across GitHub using search qualifiers

tools.name: github_update_pr
tools.description: Update a pull request title, body, state, or base branch

tools.name: github_add_pr_review
tools.description: Submit a review on a pull request (approve, request changes, or comment)

tools.name: github_get_job_logs
tools.description: Get logs and details for a specific GitHub Actions workflow job

tools.name: github_get_me
tools.description: Get the authenticated GitHub user's profile information

tools.name: github_search_users
tools.description: Search for GitHub users and organizations

tools.name: github_list_notifications
tools.description: List GitHub notifications for the authenticated user

tools.name: github_star_repo
tools.description: Star a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_unstar_repo
tools.description: Unstar a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_list_gists
tools.description: List gists for a GitHub user

tools.name: github_get_gist
tools.description: Get the content of a specific GitHub gist

tools.name: github_create_gist
tools.description: Create a new GitHub gist with one or more files

tools.name: github_list_code_scanning_alerts
tools.description: List code scanning (SAST) security alerts for a repository

tools.name: github_list_dependabot_alerts
tools.description: List Dependabot vulnerability alerts for a repository

tools.name: github_list_discussions
tools.description: List discussions in a GitHub repository

tools.name: github_get_discussion
tools.description: Get a specific GitHub discussion with its body and comments
